overall.description: An astronaut in a spacesuit floats weightlessly in deep space among a scattered asteroid field, with a large spherical celestial body visible below. The scene features dramatic backlighting from a distant star, creating a cinematic sci-fi atmosphere typical of modern space exploration games.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field with distant star lighting

agents.ego_description: Astronaut in spacesuit slowly tumbling and rotating in zero gravity while drifting among asteroids

entered.detail: Large rocky asteroid with rough grey surface floating in space
Scattered field of various sized space rocks and debris
Large spherical celestial body with pale grey cratered surface
Astronaut in detailed spacesuit with backpack thruster unit

segments.scene_description: The astronaut floats serenely in the vastness of deep space, slowly rotating in zero gravity. A large asteroid drifts from the right middle ground toward the distance while the camera maintains focus on the tumbling spacesuit figure. The pale spherical body of a moon dominates the lower frame, and scattered asteroids fill the starry background under the cold blue light of a distant star.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the silent void of deep space, focusing on a drifting astronaut against a backdrop of celestial bodies. It begins with the astronaut floating serenely in zero gravity, slowly rotating as the camera maintains a steady focus on the tumbling figure. As the movement continues, a large asteroid drifts from the right middle ground toward the distance, adding a sense of depth to the vast expanse. The scene then expands to reveal the pale spherical body of a moon dominating the lower frame, while scattered asteroids fill the starry background under the cold blue light of a distant star.
